name: Possible Shadow Credentials Added
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Elastic (idea)
SIGMA Title: Possible Shadow Credentials Added
SIGMA Description: Detects possible addition of shadow credentials to an active directory object.

False positives:
- Modifications in the msDS-KeyCredentialLink attribute can be done legitimately by the Azure AD Connect synchronization account or the ADFS service account. These accounts can be added as Exceptions. (From elastic FP section)

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=5136 AND (Username='msDS-KeyCredentialLink' OR "Account Name"='msDS-KeyCredentialLink' OR "Distinguished Name"='msDS-KeyCredentialLink') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Possible Shadow Credentials Added on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=5136 AND (Username='msDS-KeyCredentialLink' OR "Account Name"='msDS-KeyCredentialLink' OR "Distinguished Name"='msDS-KeyCredentialLink') AQL filter query
